zh.lifeSummary: 當Dietrich VII. von Kleve於1226年出生在可列福時，他的父親Dietrich VI. von Kleve42歲，母親Hedwig von Meißen21歲。他於1253年與Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1275年在他的家鄉享年49歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Kleve
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Kleve (earlier Cleve) in Lower Rhineland, Westphalia, or Schleswig-Holstein. The placename probably derives from an old topographic term cleve ‘swamp’. Compare Cleve .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Kleiva, from Old Norse kleif, klif ‘cliff, rocky ascent with a road or path’.

variants.name: Klever
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Kurt, Ulrike.
German and Dutch: habitational name for someone from Kleve in the Rhineland or Schleswig-Holstein (see   Kleve   1).

German: from Middle Low German klēver ‘clover, meadow’, also ‘resin, turpentine’, hence a metonymic occupational name either for a farmer who grew clover or for someone who collected resin and distilled turpentine. In the Alemannic area this was also a nickname for a bungler. Compare Cleaver and Clever .

variants.name: Kleven
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Berger, Hjalmer, Jalmer, Knute, Maren, Obert, Thor, Thorval.
Norwegian: habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads all over Norway named Kleven, from the definite singular form of   Kleve  . Compare   Cleven   and   Cleveland  .
Dutch and German: rare variant of   Cleven  .

nameMeanings.name: Dietrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: VII.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dietrich VII. von Kleve was born in 1226, in Cleves, his father, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, was 42 and his mother, Hedwig von Meißen, was 21. He married Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim in 1253. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1275, in his hometown, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dietrich VII. von Kleve est né en 1226, à Kleve, son père, Dietrich VI. von Kleve, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Meißen, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim en 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1275, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans.

Er hat 1253 Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1275 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dietrich VII. von Kleve родился в 1226 г. в местности клив, его отцу по имени Dietrich VI. von Kleve было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Meißen, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleidis von Heinsberg-Sponheim в 1253 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1275 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет.
